dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 9044 IH: Minority Fellowship Program Reauthorization Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mrs. Watson Coleman introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Energy and Commerce

form.official-title: To amend title V of the Public Health Service Act to reauthorize the Minority Fellowship Program.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Minority Fellowship Program Reauthorization Act of 2026.
Section 597(c) of the Public Health Service Act (42 U.S.C. 297ll(c)) is amended by inserting , and $27,000,000 for each fiscal years 2028 through 2032 after 2027.
